summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by recipe.

entries.contract: Source-backed recipe schema validation, list/explain/dry-run/run behavior, cleanup, and failure reporting remain intact.
entries.worth: This catches recipe-runner drift where command manifests still dispatch but executable recipe safety, cleanup, or JSON contracts regress.
entries.guard: uses isolated AOS_STATE_ROOT and an auto-started repo daemon for bounded canvas cleanup checks

entries.contract: Recipe saved-ref postcondition examples stay schema-valid and remain evidence, not Work Record replay authority.
entries.worth: This keeps recipe postcondition drift from turning evidence checks into a hidden replay contract.
